name: seo_research_keywords
description:
Use this when you need keyword ideas, SEO research, or content planning data for a topic. Returns keyword suggestions and intent data in JSON. POST variant of seo_research_keywords -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

Returns: 1. suggestions array (Google autocomplete) 2. rel

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "seo_research_keywords" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:
before: "(hash 0d93dd94)" → after: "Use this when you need keyword ideas, SEO research, or content planning data for a topic. Returns keyword suggestions and intent data in JSON. POST variant of seo_research_keywords -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
